root_cause: Scanner generates very large redundant JSON files by embedding full metadata in graph nodes and complexity reports instead of using references to canonical entity definitions

current_state.architecture: Flat embedding pattern with repeated metadata

target_state.architecture: UUID-based entity registry with reference-based graph

implementation_approach.phase_1_registry: Create entity registry with UUID5-based deduplication
implementation_approach.phase_2_graph_refactor: Update graph generator to use UUID references
implementation_approach.phase_3_selective_modes: Add CLI flags for selective scanning

risks: Breaking changes if consumers rely on embedded metadata
Complexity of migration path for existing scans
mitigations: Maintain dual output during transition (legacy + registry)
Provide migration guide and compatibility layer
